title: ctenium brachystachyum
intro: Ctenium brachystachyum, also known as "Short Spike Buttongrass," is a perennial grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ctenium brachystachyum include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in local remedies for wound healing and skin infections.
